result.disclaimer: A guided demo recommendation. Your real shortlist is confirmed by a licensed local partner before anything is filed.

building.help: This shapes tax treatment and what investors expect to see.

base.help: Your residency drives tax exposure and banking access.

market.q: Where are most of your customers?
market.help: Revenue location affects the smartest place to register.

raising.help: Investor familiarity can outweigh a slightly lower tax rate.

banking.q: How soon do you need a bank account?
banking.help: Some jurisdictions open remote banking in days, others take weeks.

priority.help: Pick up to two — Gabriella weighs these highest.

email.q: Where should Gabriella send your report?
email.help: Your ranked shortlist with full reasoning. No spam, ever.

delaware.name: Delaware, USA
delaware.why: The default for startups raising from US VCs — investors know the C-Corp paperwork cold.

singapore.name: Singapore
singapore.why: Fast remote setup, world-class banking and a credible Asian HQ with strong treaty access.

uk.name: United Kingdom
uk.why: The fastest credible incorporation, strong banking and easy access to EU and US customers.

estonia.name: Estonia
estonia.why: 0% tax on reinvested profit and fully digital admin — ideal for lean, remote-first teams.

ireland.name: Ireland
ireland.why: Low corporate tax inside the EU — the classic base for software selling into Europe.

dubai.name: Dubai, UAE
dubai.why: Near-zero tax, premium banking and a fast-growing hub for Middle East and global trade.
